task_completion.description: Verify the vehicle is created with the correct make, model, and license plate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vehicle record or list view in the Odoo Fleet module showing 'Ford Transit' and the license plate 'TRK-885-XJ'.

task_completion.description: Verify the vehicle's VIN is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chassis Number / VIN field in the vehicle details form containing '1FT-YRN-2025-XK99'.

task_completion.description: Verify a leasing contract is created for the vehicle with the correct vendor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a contract record associated with the vehicle showing the vendor 'Gemini Fleet Services' and the type 'Leasing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the leasing contract has the correct cost, date, and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contract details showing a recurring cost of '$650.00' (per month), an Activation Date matching the current date, and the status set to 'In Progress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the initial odometer reading is logged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an odometer log or field associated with the vehicle showing a value of '45' (miles).

task_completion.description: Verify a service event is created with the correct description and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a service record titled 'Pre-delivery safety inspection' with the service type 'Repair or Inspection'.

task_completion.description: Verify the service event has the correct vendor and cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the service record details showing the vendor 'Gemini Fleet Services' and a total cost of '$125.00'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application running in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual Odoo form fields, not just typed into a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the records are genuinely created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Odoo UI elements like save buttons, breadcrumbs, and status indicators confirming the records are saved in the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ford Transit is a real vehicle model. The vendor 'Gemini Fleet Services' is synthetically created for this task. The contract cost ($650.0), odometer value (45), and service cost ($125.0) are synthetic test values. The license plate 'TRK-885-XJ' and VIN '1FT-YRN-2025-XK99' are also synthetic and may not follow real-world formatting rules.
